en: They appeared together in Chasing Amy and Blue Whale Hunting, for which Damon received the Best Actor nomination.
ko: 둘은 '체이싱 에이미'와 '굿 윌 헌팅'에 함께 출연했고,

en: This is their first Academy Award.
ko: 이것은 그들의 첫 번째 아카데미 상입니다.

en: I just said to Matt, losing would suck and winning would be really scary, and it's really, really scary.
ko: 저는 맷에게 말했어요, 지면 정말 싫을 거고 이기면 정말 무서울 거라고,

en: You know, we're just really two young guys who were fortunate enough to be involved with a lot of great people,
ko: 저희는 그저 많은 훌륭한 분들과 함께할 수 있었던 행운의 두 젊은이일 뿐이에요.

en: whom it's incumbent upon us to... There's no way we're doing this in less than 20 seconds.
ko: 이걸 20초 안에 끝내는 건 절대 불가능해요.

en: Upon whom it's incumbent of us to thank
ko: 우리를 믿고 이 영화를 만들어 준 하비 와인스틴에게 감사드립니다.

en: Harvey Weinstein, who believed in us and made this movie, Gus Van Santz for brilliant direction,
ko: 훌륭한 연출을 해주신 거스 반 산트.

en: Robin Williams, who delivered some great lines, Minnie Driver, whose performance was brilliant,
ko: 멋진 대사를 전달해 주신 로빈 윌리엄스.

en: Stellan Skarsgård, who was great. Your brother. My brother Casey, who was brilliant in the movie.
ko: 훌륭한 연기를 보여준 미니 드라이버. 멋진 연기를 한 스텔란 스카르스가르드. 그리고 형.
